    10	  "implementation_summary": [
    11	    "Added mio as a workspace dependency with os-poll and net features; Cargo.lock resolves mio 1.2.0.",
    12	    "Replaced the std nonblocking linear plain-TCP owner scan with mio::Poll, mio::Events, listener token 0, and stable slot-derived client tokens.",

    14	    "Client writable interest is registered only while ClientWriteBuffer has pending bytes and removed when the buffer drains.",
    15	    "Slots that hit MAX_COMMANDS_PER_SLOT_TICK with a complete command still buffered are rescheduled by the owner loop without waiting for another socket readiness edge.",
